title: Bombardment
description:
Deal 18 damage.
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.
upgraded_description:
Deal 24 damage.
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.
notes: This card automatically plays from the Exhaust Pile at the start of your turn, providing repeatable guaranteed damage on subsequent turns.
